chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Sulayman Ibn Hafs Al-Marwazi

text: و ما كان فيه عن سليمان بن حفص المروزيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد اللّه البرقيّ، عن سليمان بن حفص المروزيّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Sulayman ibn Hafs Al-Marwazi has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Abi Abdullah Al-Barqi, from Sulayman ibn Hafs Al-Marwazi.
